classObjective: Apply proportions to percent situations, scaling problems, and mixture contexts.
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: part-whole ratios in percent contexts; coffee blending and acid solution mixture problems; unit pricing
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice applying proportions to percent situations, scaling, and mixture problems
independentPractice: Practice problems solving percent, scaling, and mixture problems using proportions
assessment: Exit ticket: solve a percent mixture problem using proportions
capReflection: How are mixture problems different from scaling problems when using proportions?
